entries.head: 1986c9cc3b6f713eb0b54493234e1c6aa46d4396
entries.milestone: p24 correction: prior p24 fix was a false alarm. The two fingerprints (32BCEDE8C8DD8B00 primary / 04426AB7A3988D84559D9B92B3BFEC4C80900BF9 signing subkey) belong to the SAME key — public GPG-KEY.asc was always correct. No functional change; commits 9a524bd+1986c9c re-exported byte-identical key + duplicate. Audit script corrected. Honest record kept.
